widget.title: Oak catch list — before Pryce (150 cumulative)

rows.label: Second Moon Stone evolution (Wigglytuff/Nidoqueen/Nidoking)
rows.note: Tohjo Falls — Surf east from New Bark to the Moon Stone

rows.label: Natu → Xatu (L25)
rows.note: Ruins of Alph grassy area via Union Cave basement (Surf), all times

rows.label: Smeargle
rows.note: Same Ruins grassy area — NOT at night

rows.label: Third Moon Stone evolution
rows.note: Ruins of Alph: Surf the pool to the Aerodactyl tile puzzle room; Flash at the rear wall opens a secret room with a Moon Stone

rows.label: Beach Suicune sighting + Eusine battle (Cianwood)
rows.note: REQUIRED to catch Suicune later — don't skip the sequence

rows.label: RED GYARADOS
rows.note: Lake of Rage — the guaranteed shiny; grab TM Thief in the Rocket Hideout for held-item steals later
